queries.question: Provide a list of all documentaries and also provide a list of short films with a budget of 700000.0.
queries.sql:
SELECT filmmaking.name 
FROM film_type JOIN film_details ON film_type.id = film_details.film_typeId JOIN budget ON film_details.budgetId = budget.id JOIN filmmaking ON filmmaking.id = film_details.filmmakingId
WHERE film_type.type = "Documentary" OR film_type.type = "Short Film" AND budget.amount = 700000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?film_type a :film_type .
  ?film_details a :film_details .
  ?film_details p:hasfilm_type ?film_type .
  ?budget a :budget .
  ?film_details p:hasbudget ?budget .
  ?filmmaking a :filmmaking .
  ?film_details p:hasfilmmaking ?filmmaking .
  ?filmmaking p:name ?name .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?budget p:amount ?amount_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Documentary" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Short Film" && (STR(?amount_w) = "700000" || STR(?amount_w) = "700000.0"))))
}

queries.question: Which documentaries had a budget of 700000.0 and which short films had the same amount of budget?
queries.sql:
SELECT filmmaking.name 
FROM film_type JOIN film_details ON film_type.id = film_details.film_typeId JOIN budget ON film_details.budgetId = budget.id JOIN filmmaking ON filmmaking.id = film_details.filmmakingId
WHERE (film_type.type = "Documentary" OR film_type.type = "Short Film") AND budget.amount = 700000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?film_type a :film_type .
  ?film_details a :film_details .
  ?film_details p:hasfilm_type ?film_type .
  ?budget a :budget .
  ?film_details p:hasbudget ?budget .
  ?filmmaking a :filmmaking .
  ?film_details p:hasfilmmaking ?filmmaking .
  ?filmmaking p:name ?name .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?budget p:amount ?amount_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Documentary" || STR(?type_w2) = "Short Film")) && (STR(?amount_w) = "700000" || STR(?amount_w) = "700000.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display documentaries and short films with a budget of 700000.0.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?film_type a :film_type .
  ?film_details a :film_details .
  ?film_details p:hasfilm_type ?film_type .
  ?budget a :budget .
  ?film_details p:hasbudget ?budget .
  ?filmmaking a :filmmaking .
  ?film_details p:hasfilmmaking ?filmmaking .
  ?filmmaking p:name ?name .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?budget p:amount ?amount_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Documentary" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Short Film" && (STR(?amount_w) = "700000" || STR(?amount_w) = "700000.0"))))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?film_type a :film_type .
  ?film_details a :film_details .
  ?film_details p:hasfilm_type ?film_type .
  ?budget a :budget .
  ?film_details p:hasbudget ?budget .
  ?filmmaking a :filmmaking .
  ?film_details p:hasfilmmaking ?filmmaking .
  ?filmmaking p:name ?name .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w .
  ?film_type p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?budget p:amount ?amount_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Documentary" || STR(?type_w2) = "Short Film")) && (STR(?amount_w) = "700000" || STR(?amount_w) = "700000.0")))
} }
}
